titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, Deutsche Welle
mainText: North Korea fired approximately 10 ballistic missiles toward the sea, according to South Korea.
The United States deployed USS Tripoli, an amphibious assault ship, to the Middle East.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, Deutsche Welle
mainText: Cuba releases 51 prisoners following talks with Vatican.

titleText: JTF News: CBC News, The Guardian
mainText: Two people died after donating plasma at Canadian clinics under federal investigation.
